# Business context

## Problem statement
**Answer:** Users need clearer onboarding for team invites.
**Confidence:** medium
**Evidence:** user input
**Skill:** lamina-problem-framing

## Business goals
**Answer:** Reduce invite drop-off during team setup.
**Confidence:** medium
**Evidence:** user input
**Skill:** lamina-stakeholder-alignment

## Success metrics
**Answer:** Invite completion rate above 70%.
**Confidence:** low
**Evidence:** assumption — needs validation
**Skill:** lamina-quantitative-validation

## Scope
**Answer:** Team invite flow only.
**Confidence:** high
**Evidence:** user input
**Skill:** lamina-feature-prioritization

## Users & market
**Answer:** Team admins setting up new workspaces.
**Confidence:** medium
**Evidence:** user input
**Skill:** lamina-competitive-analysis

## Product posture
**Answer:** Web-first admin workflow.
**Confidence:** medium
**Evidence:** user input
**Skill:** lamina-platform-posture

## Constraints
**Answer:** Must ship before enterprise pilot.
**Confidence:** high
**Evidence:** user input
**Skill:** lamina-research-scoping

## Stakeholders
**Answer:** Growth PM owns activation metrics.
**Confidence:** medium
**Evidence:** user input
**Skill:** lamina-stakeholder-alignment

## Risks & unknowns
**Answer:** Email deliverability may affect invite success.
**Confidence:** low
**Evidence:** assumption — needs validation

## Research posture
**Answer:** Evaluative — test invite copy variants.
**Confidence:** medium
